title: What does a wise wealth creator do on Monday morning?
subtitle: A journal prompt set for mapping the ordinary weekly habits of the wealth-building identity.
excerpt: A journal prompt set from Day 23 of the MONEY program. Use to move from claiming the identity of a wise wealth creator to understanding what that identity looks like in the specific choices of an ordinary week.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025) and the Week 4 daily prompts of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use after claiming the wise-wealth-creator identity, when you want to map what that actually means in your week.

content.text: A journal prompt set from Day 23 of the MONEY program. The prompts map the wise-wealth-creator identity into specific behaviour, not abstract qualities. What she does, what she checks, what she decides on an ordinary Monday. Twenty minutes, no editing.
New to journalling as a practice? Read
What does being a wise steward of money mean to me, in plain words?
Write your own definition. Not a dictionary definition. Yours.
Where do I already demonstrate wisdom and discernment in my life?
Look for evidence. It doesn't have to be financial.
What does a wise wealth creator do on Monday morning?
Specific actions, not attitudes. What does she actually do?
What financial decisions or insights am I proud of that show I can be trusted with more?
Write the moments. Name them plainly.
What is one habit a wise wealth creator would have that I could start this week?
One small, concrete habit. Write it as a specific action, not a resolution.
Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025) and the Week 4 daily prompts of The Money Journal (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
